positive: A vibrant, intricate celestial mandala design featuring intertwined constellations, nebulas, and stylized lunar cycles. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical, centered, and isolated on a solid background. Use bold, graphic linework combined with watercolor-like gradients for the cosmic elements. Key colors should be deep sapphire blues, ethereal lavender, shimmering gold, and pops of bright cyan. The style should mimic modern bohemian geometric art and tattoo flash, emphasizing clean, crisp silhouettes and high contrast for maximum print readability. Minimalist, maximalist details, sacred geometry.
negative: blurry, artifact, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, out of frame, messy, dirty, grunge, sketch, photorealism, realistic background, logos, trademarks, lettering
